Instructors

Simon Apen-Sadler

Simon Apen-Sadler has over 20 years experience in Shotokan Karate and started training at 8 years old. He is currently a 4th Dan Black Belt with the JKA. He continues to train regularly at Cambridge Karate Club with Sensei Ken Hori.

In April 2024, he travelled to Tokyo and Okinawa, to train with some of JKA's top instructors as well as traditional Okinawan karate masters.

He previously trained under Jim Lewis with the KWF and the SKA under Greg Durant.

Certifications

  • Fully Enhanced DBS Certification
  • D Grade Instructor, Judge and Examiner (KWF)
  • BMABA Level 1 Instructor Award

Competition Results

  • 2016 KWF England Nationals Team Kata Gold Medallist Imperial College Shotokan Karate Club
  • 2013-2014 British University and Colleges Sport (BUCS) Team Kata Bronze Medallist, Imperial College Shotokan Karate Club
  • 2012 KWF England U21 Kumite Gold Medallist

BMABA Register

Simon is registered with the BMABA (British Martial Arts and Boxing Association). You can verify his details on their website.
